compiled_state.title: Implement ticket_comment in library and wire dispatcher
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What to Implement
Add ticket_comment to plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh and wire dispatcher comment case.

## Scope (ticket-comment.sh is 104 lines — pure bash after write_commit_event rehome)
ticket_comment <ticket_id> <body>:
- Parse args; validate ticket_id and body non-empty
- If DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1: exec bash $SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-comment.sh "$@"; return $?
- Pure bash: build COMMENT event JSON; write via write_commit_event
- Use return (not exit) for all error paths
- Preserve timestamp and author fields from original script behavior

Dispatcher change: replace exec bash .../ticket-comment.sh with _ticketlib_dispatch ticket_comment "$@"

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ticket_comment defined in ticket-lib-api.sh
  Verify: grep -q "^ticket_comment" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh
- [ ] DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 routes to ticket-comment.sh
  Verify: grep -A5 "ticket_comment" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh | grep -q "DSO_TICKET_LEGACY"
- [ ] test_ticket_comment_via_library passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "PASS.*comment"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
